text: Good morning to the person who makes every sunrise worth waking up for.
author: Unknown

text: The sun is up, and so are my thoughts of you. Good morning, love.
author: Unknown

text: Every morning I wake up grateful that you're mine. Good morning.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning! May your coffee be strong and your day be as lovely as you are.
author: Unknown

text: Waking up with you on my mind is the best way to start any day.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning, sunshine — you make mornings something to look forward to.
author: Unknown

text: I hope the first thing you feel today is loved. Good morning.
author: Unknown

text: Rise and shine, my love. The world is a little brighter now that you're awake.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning to the smile I can't wait to see and the voice I can't wait to hear.
author: Unknown

text: May your morning be soft, your coffee be warm, and your heart know it is loved.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning. I hope today is as wonderful as you are to me.
author: Unknown

text: Every sunrise is a new page. Good morning — let's make today a beautiful one.
author: Unknown

text: You are my favorite reason to open my eyes each morning.
author: Unknown

text: Sending you a good morning full of warmth, coffee, and a whole lot of love.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning, my love. No matter what today brings, remember you are adored.
author: Unknown

text: The best mornings are the ones that begin with a thought of you.
author: Unknown

text: Wake up, beautiful — the day has been waiting for you.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning! I'd cross an ocean just to make you coffee.
author: Unknown

text: A new day, a fresh start, and the same old love for you. Good morning.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning to the one who turns my ordinary days into something worth remembering.
author: Unknown

text: May today be gentle with you and give back all the light you give the world.
author: Unknown

text: I wish I could kiss your forehead and say good morning in person today.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning, love. You are the first thought that made me smile today.
author: Unknown

text: Here's to a morning as sweet as you and a day as bright as your smile.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning! Some miles apart, same sun, same love.
author: Unknown

text: May your day be filled with the same warmth you bring into my life. Good morning.
author: Unknown

text: Waking up is easier knowing the world has you in it. Good morning.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning, my heart. Go be wonderful today — it comes naturally to you.
author: Unknown

text: I hope your morning is soft and your day is kind. Thinking of you already.
author: Unknown

text: Every good morning I send is really just me saying: I'm still crazy about you.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning to the person who feels like sunshine even on a cloudy day.
author: Unknown

text: Open your eyes, love — the world is lucky to have you in it again today.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning. May you find a reason to smile before your feet even hit the floor.
author: Unknown

text: The alarm is annoying, but the thought of you is worth waking up for. Good morning.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning! Let today be one more chapter in a story I love writing with you.
author: Unknown

text: Coffee first, then conquering the day — and always, always thinking of you. Good morning.
author: Unknown

text: May your morning coffee taste a little sweeter knowing someone loves you this much.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning, my dear. You are the best part of every day I've ever had.
author: Unknown

text: Sunrise looks better knowing I get to share my day with someone like you.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning! Wherever you are, I hope you feel the hug I'm sending across the miles.
author: Unknown

text: A brand-new day and my heart still picks you. Good morning.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning, love. Take on the world today — I'll be cheering for you from here.
author: Unknown

text: May this morning bring you peace, and may this day bring you everything you deserve.
author: Unknown

text: Good morning to the last person I thought of last night and the first one this morning.
author: Unknown

text: Start your day knowing you are loved beyond measure. Good morning.
author: Unknown
